channel.title: BBC Sport
channel.copyright: Copyright: (C) British Broadcasting Corporation, see https://www.bbc.co.uk/usingthebbc/terms-of-use/#15metadataandrssfeeds for terms and conditions of reuse.

item.title: 'Joshua warm-up defeat would scupper Fury fight'
item.description: The long-awaited showdown between Tyson Fury and Anthony Joshua will not happen if Joshua loses his July warm-up bout, says promoter Frank Warren.

item.title: Why Joshua's interim bout adds jeopardy to Fury fight
item.description: Promoter Frank Warren says Anthony Joshua's proposed fight with Tyson Fury would be in doubt if Joshua loses to Albania's Kristian Prenga in July.

item.title: Azim to fight Claggett live on BBC in May
item.description: Adam Azim is set to take on Canadian Steve Claggett in London in May and it will be shown live on BBC Two and BBC iPlayer.

item.title: Billam-Smith headlines Zuffa's UK debut show in June
item.description: Former world cruiserweight champion Chris Billam-Smith will headline Zuffa Boxing's first show in the UK against Canadian Ryan Rozicki.

item.title: Joshua signs deal to fight Fury - Hearn
item.description: Former heavyweight world champion Anthony Joshua has signed to fight Tyson Fury but will first have a warm-up fight against Kristian Prenga in Riyadh on 25 July.

item.title: Yafai to top Sheffield bill after Smith injury
item.description: Britain's WBC light-welterweight champion Dalton Smith is ruled out of his fight with Alberto Puello through injury.

item.title: 'The world lost Ricky Hatton, but he was just Dad to me'
item.description: Campbell Hatton says the family were touched when thousands lined the streets for the boxer's funeral.

item.title: Support from fans a 'blessing' for Hatton family
item.description: Ricky Hatton's son Campbell says the family have not been able to grieve privately but calls the support they have had from people a "blessing".

item.title: Okolie fight cancelled after Briton fails doping test
item.description: British boxer Lawrence Okolie fails a doping test before his heavyweight fight against Tony Yoka, leading to the event in Paris this weekend being called off.

item.title: Whittaker gets another quick knockout - what next?
item.description: British light-heavyweight Ben Whittaker produces a brilliant first-round knockout against Argentina's Braian Suarez in Liverpool.

item.title: Watch every episode
item.description: Natasha Jonas and Chris Eubank Jr feature

item.title: 'I've signed, he hasn't' - Fury only interested in Joshua fight
item.description: Tyson Fury says the only fight he is now interested in taking on is against fellow Briton Anthony Joshua.

item.title: Fury challenges Joshua after comeback win against Makhmudov
item.description: Tyson Fury calls out Anthony Joshua for the fight "you've all been waiting for", after his unanimous decision win against Arslanbek Makhmudov at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium.

item.title: 'I needed that time away' - Fury on comeback
item.description: Tyson Fury says he was 'sick of boxing' and 'needed time away' to realise he could come out of retirement.

item.title: I would have been a miserable world champion - Orie
item.description: Delicious Orie tells BBC Breakfast that he feared he would have ended up being a "very depressed, sad and miserable world champion" when asked about his shock decision to retire from boxing.

item.title: The decade-long struggle to get AJ & Fury together
item.description: Tyson Fury and Anthony Joshua shared a moment on Saturday, but getting the British heavyweights together this year may not be as straightforward as many suspected.

item.title: Depression fears drove Orie's retirement decision
item.description: Delicious Orie discusses his shock decision to retire from boxing and why he wants to be a role model for the younger generation.

item.title: 'A messed-up situation' - world champion Dubois on family rift
item.description: Caroline Dubois opens up about her family rift and says she wants to reconcile with her brother Daniel, as she looks to unify lightweight world titles.

item.title: 'Kicked to the kerb' - is boxing failing its heroes?
item.description: Following the death of Ricky Hatton, families and former champions tell a new BBC documentary the sport has not filled the void in care for its fighters.

item.title: Privilege, criticism & VAR - life as a boxing referee
item.description: Phil Edwards speaks to BBC Sport about what it's really like to be a boxing referee and whether he thinks VAR could work in the sport.

item.title: Dickens' two-day ordeal from Dubai to Dublin for world title bout
item.description: James 'Jazza' Dickens has taken the elongated road to his first world title defence on Saturday - and that is not confined to his professional boxing career.

item.title: 'Can't live in the past' - Warren on boxing's future after 45 years as promoter
item.description: After celebrating 45 years as a boxing promoter this year and a period of rapid change, Frank Warren expects more to come in the next decades.

item.title: 'You're under arrest' - how Ngamba made history against all odds
item.description: Cindy Ngamba shares her incredible story from refugee to Olympic medallist.

item.title: 'I wouldn't wish what I went through on my worst enemy'
item.description: Undisputed middleweight boxing world champion Claressa Shields opens up about her harrowing journey to the top of her sport.

item.title: From rock bottom to three world titles at 37
item.description: Natasha Jonas tells her story, including what it took to come back and win three world titles at 37.

item.title: Being a Eubank, living up to dad and dealing with grief
item.description: Born To Brawl: Chris Eubank Jr tells his story of grief and living up to his dad

item.title: Are Prince Naseem Hamed's sons coming for his throne?
item.description: Get to know the Hameds' journey ahead of Aadam Hamed's debut on the Oleksandr Usyk v Daniel Dubois undercard.

item.title: Tyson rates him: Is traveller Dennis McCann boxing's next superstar?
item.description: Tyson Fury tips traveller boxer Dennis ‘The Menace’ McCann as future world champion

item.title: Phantom v Price - can a Gladiator keep up with a world champion?
item.description: Lauren Price meet Gladiator Phantom for a training session in the boxing gym.

item.title: Church told me I was possessed by demons aged 12
item.description: Conor Benn tells BBC Sport about growing up in an "extreme" Christian school, being told he was "demon-possessed" and how he had to rebuild a relationship with his father Nigel.

item.title: 'I gave everything to boxing and still have nothing'
item.description: Heather Hardy tells BBC Sport how she is adapting to life outside of boxing after the former world champion was left with a life-threatening injury.
